description: Letter from Abū Manṣūr al-Fakhr al-Mutaṭabbib (the physician). In Arabic script. Mentions Alexandria and "even if you paid me 1000 dinars" and al-shaykh Yūsuf. On verso there is the remnant of the address, a list of names in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals, and a few verses from the Book of Esther in Hebrew. Needs further examination.
